pulse: The energy sector is currently trading at median valuation multiples of 11.1x EV/EBITDA and 18.6x P/E, slightly above the broader market benchmarks. Notably, XOM has an EV/EBITDA of 11.6x and a trailing P/E of 23.1x, outperforming the sector average, as recent headlines highlight the impact of rising oil prices due to the Iran conflict, which is likely to enhance the outlook for integrated oil companies. Looking ahead, investors should remain cautious and consider potential volatility in energy stocks, as sustained geopolitical tensions could drive oil prices higher, ultimately impacting margins across the sector.
